input_question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?
decomposed_queries: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Ipilimumab'?
Which trials have Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall > 21?
top_candidate_question: What trials have Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall > 21?
top_candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;
